hooks.name: load-active-mission-context
hooks.description: Loads active mission context on session start for cross-session persistence

hooks.name: validate-state-write
hooks.description: Validates state.json after every write — catches corruption immediately

hooks.name: block-pipe-masking
hooks.description: Blocks commands piped through tail/head that mask exit codes

hooks.name: protect-sealed-milestones
hooks.description: Warns when writing features.json in missions with sealed milestones
